# beautiful-ui v0.1

First public package for making AI coding agents design better UI before implementation.

## Included

- Core `beautiful-ui` skill.
- Web, iOS, Android, and verification skills.
- Six concise references for workflow, design quality, outputs, anti-patterns, platform selection, and repo-first design.
- Five before/after examples.
- Install docs, roadmap, contribution guide, and issue templates.
- Validation script for package completeness.

## Recommended GitHub topics

`ai`, `agent-skills`, `ui-design`, `design-system`, `accessibility`, `codex`, `claude-code`, `frontend`, `ios`, `android`
